---
title: "Calculate distance between AutoDock Vina ligand distance and crystal structure"
author: "Mehnaz Meem"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
    fig_width: 5
    fig_height: 5
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
theme: cosmo
---

Source: TBA

## Introduction

```{r,libs}

message("todo")

```

## Crystal structure position

```{r,crystal}

cx = 10.422
cy = -16.270
cz = 12.404

```

## Read data

```{read r, autodock_data}

pdb <- readLines("docking_6_100.pdbqt")
hetatm <- pdb[grep("HETATM",pdb)]
hetatm <- strsplit(hetatm," ")
hetatm[[1]][which(hetatm[[1]]!="")]
hetatm <- lapply(hetatm,function(x) { x[which(x!="")]  } )
hetatm_df <- do.call(rbind.data.frame, hetatm)
colnames(hetatm_df) <- paste("col",1:12)
```



Extract numerical coordinates (col6-8).
Data converted to numerical matrix

```{r,extract_coords}

mx <- apply(hetatm_df[,6:8],2,as.numeric)

str(mx)
summary(mx)

```

## Define ligand box

```{r,lig_box}

min_x <- min(mx[,1])
max_x <- max(mx[,1])
min_y <- min(mx[,2])
max_y <- max(mx[,2])
min_z <- min(mx[,3])
max_z <- max(mx[,3])

```

Prediction ligand position.

```{r,pred}

px <- ( min_x + max_x ) / 2
py <- ( min_y + max_y ) / 2
pz <- ( min_z + max_z ) / 2
```

## Calc diff

```{r,diff}

dx <- abs(cx - px)
dy <- abs(cy - py)
dz <- abs(cz - pz)

```

## 3d hypotenuse

```{r,hypot}

hyp <- sqrt(dx^2 + dy^2 + dz^2)

```

## Define a function

```{r,dist_function}

cxyz <- c(10.422,-16.270,12.404)

model_ligand_dist <- function(cxyz,pdbqt_file) {
pdb <- readLines(pdbqt_file)
hetatm <- pdb[grep("HETATM",pdb)]
hetatm <- strsplit(hetatm," ")
hetatm[[1]][which(hetatm[[1]]!="")]
hetatm <- lapply(hetatm,function(x) { x[which(x!="")]  } )
hetatm_df <- do.call(rbind.data.frame, hetatm)
colnames(hetatm_df) <- paste("col",1:12)
mx <- apply(hetatm_df[,6:8],2,as.numeric)
min_x <- min(mx[,1])
max_x <- max(mx[,1])
min_y <- min(mx[,2])
max_y <- max(mx[,2])
min_z <- min(mx[,3])
max_z <- max(mx[,3])
px <- ( min_x + max_x ) / 2
py <- ( min_y + max_y ) / 2
pz <- ( min_z + max_z ) / 2
cx = cxyz[1]
cy = cxyz[2]
cz = cxyz[3]
dx <- abs(cx - px)
dy <- abs(cy - py)
dz <- abs(cz - pz)
hyp <- sqrt(dx^2 + dy^2 + dz^2)
return(hyp)
}

```

Test the function.

```{r,functest}

model_ligand_dist(cxyz,"docking_6_100.pdbqt")

```

Run for all pdbqt files

```{r,runall}

myfiles <- list.files(".",pattern="pdbqt")
myfiles <- myfiles[grep("docking",myfiles)]

distance <- unlist(lapply(myfiles, function(f) {
  model_ligand_dist(cxyz,f)
} ) )

names(distance) <- myfiles
barplot(distance)
distance

```

```{bash}
library(beeswarm)

# Find all docking pdbqt files
myfiles <- list.files(".", pattern = "^docking_[0-9]+_[0-9]+\\.pdbqt$")

# Calculate distance for all files
distance <- unlist(lapply(myfiles, function(f) {
  model_ligand_dist(cxyz, f)
}))

names(distance) <- myfiles

# Create data frame
df <- data.frame(
  file = names(distance),
  distance = as.numeric(distance),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Extract exhaustiveness value
df$exhaustiveness <- sub("^docking_([0-9]+)_.*", "\\1", df$file)

# Order exhaustiveness values
df$exhaustiveness <- factor(
  df$exhaustiveness,
  levels = c("6","8","10","12","14","16","18","20")
)

# Split distances by exhaustiveness
dist_list <- split(df$distance, df$exhaustiveness)

# Boxplot
boxplot(
  dist_list,
  xlab = "Exhaustiveness",
  ylab = "Docking Distance (Å)",
  main = "Docking Distance by Exhaustiveness",
  col = "white",
  border = "black"
)

# Add beeswarm points
beeswarm(
  dist_list,
  add = TRUE,
  pch = 19,
  cex = 1.2,
  col = "darkgray"
)
```



## Session info

For reproducibility.

```{r,session}

sessionInfo()

```
